name: Oscar Munoz
bio: Oscar Munoz served as the CEO of United Airlines from 2015 to 2020, overseeing the company during the 2017 passenger removal crisis.
_evidence: As CEO, he was directly responsible for the airline's initial response, which was widely criticized as defensive, before he later issued a formal apology and committed to policy changes.

name: David Dao
bio: Dr. David Dao is a Vietnamese-American physician who became the central figure in the 2017 United Airlines incident after being forcibly removed from a flight.
_evidence: He was the victim of the violent removal, and his subsequent legal action and public stance forced a massive shift in airline passenger handling policies.
